# Implement Instructors CRUD & CV Upload

Add instructor profiles, skill tags, and support for CV/file links or uploads.

## Tasks

- Define `Instructor` model (name, contact, areas, tools, platforms, CV URL or file ref).
- Implement CRUD API and instructor management UI.
- Add file upload storage (e.g., S3 or local) or accept external CV links.
- Add tests and UI for displaying CV/download links.

## Rationale

Instructor profiles let admins manage who teaches each group and verify qualifications.

Suggested labels: backend, frontend
